Dominate.name: Cloud Memory
Dominate.effect: Make someone forget the current moment.
Dominate.notes: No rolls are needed when the target is an unprepared mortal.

Dominate.name: Compel
Dominate.notes: No rolls are needed when the target is an unprepared mortal. However, mortals who have been Dominated in this scene already or this goes against their nature may roll to resist.

Dominate.name: Slavish Devotion
Dominate.effect: Those already underneath Dominate find it easier to resist other kindred's Dominate.
Dominate.notes: Attempts by a third party take a dice penalty equal to the other vampire’s Fortitude rating.Errata

Dominate.name: Mesmerize
Dominate.duration: Until command is carried out or the scene ends
Dominate.notes: No rolls are needed when the target is an unprepared mortal. However, if this goes against their nature they may roll to resist.

Dominate.name: Dementation
Dominate.cost: One Rouse Check per target per Scene
Dominate.notes: To use this power, the user must have had a conversation with them.

Dominate.name: Domitor's Favor
Dominate.effect: Make defiance while under a Blood Bond more difficult.
Dominate.notes: Total fail on defiance rolls means the bond does not weaken that month.

Dominate.name: The Stolen Voice
Dominate.effect: Remove a target's ability to express. Unable to speak, write or gesture.
Dominate.notes: No need to test to activate against mortals.

Dominate.name: Forgetful Mind
Dominate.notes: Each point of margin on the test allows one additional memory to be altered.

Dominate.name: Submerged Directive
Dominate.effect: Implant Dominate orders as suggestions for victims.
Dominate.notes: These orders never expire until completed and targets can only have one at a time.

Dominate.name: Ancestral Dominion
Dominate.effect: Urge a descendant to act even if against their own opinion.
Dominate.duration: Until the command is carried out or the scene ends
Dominate.notes: For each generation separating them, the target gains an additional die to resist. Errata

Dominate.name: Implant Suggestion
Dominate.effect: Change another’s personality or opinion temporarily.
Dominate.notes: No test required for unprepared mortals unless it’s a change that opposes their core beliefs.

Dominate.name: Rationalize
Dominate.effect: Convince victims of Dominate it was their idea the entire time.
Dominate.notes: If pressed on their actions the victim can make a test and if successful they question their actions.

Dominate.name: Tabula Rasa
Dominate.effect: Erase the victim's memory to the point they don't know who they are.
Dominate.notes: Following this power's use is generally a string of lies and Path Indoctrination.

Dominate.name: Lethe's Call
Dominate.notes: Unprepared mortals cannot test to resist the power. With a verbal command only memories surrounding the spoken subject will be erased.

Dominate.name: Mass Manipulation
Dominate.effect: Extend effects of Dominate to multiple targets.
Dominate.cost: One Rouse Check in addition to power it's added to
Dominate.notes: The victims need to see the eyes of the user. The user makes the roll against the strongest of the group.

Dominate.name: Terminal Decree
Dominate.effect: Bolster effects of Dominate to be able to circumvent victims' self-preservation.
Dominate.notes: Terminal commands are always resisted instead of auto failing.

Animalism.name: Bond Famulus
Animalism.effect: Create an enhanced animal companion.
Animalism.cost: Feed the animal a Rouse Check of the vampire's blood on three different nights, if this is purchased at character creation it is considered already done and the player may select an animal to be the famulus.
Animalism.notes: Vampires may only have one famulus but you can make animal ghouls without this.

Animalism.name: Sense the Beast
Animalism.effect: Sense hostility and supernatural traits.
Animalism.notes: This power can also be used actively.

Animalism.name: Animal Messenger
Animalism.effect: Use a Famulus to send a message to someone.
Animalism.duration: One or more nights based on how long it takes to search
Animalism.notes: The Famulus must test Resolve + Streetwise/Survival if target’s location is unknown against a diff 2 or Intelligence + Streetwise/Survival if the target is actively hiding.

Animalism.name: Atavism
Animalism.effect: Revert animals to their base and primal instincts.
Animalism.duration: Number of rounds equal to margin +1 or entire scene if it's a Critical win
Animalism.notes: The target must be able to sense the user for this power to work.

Animalism.name: Feral Whispers
Animalism.effect: Two-way communication with animals or summoning.
Animalism.cost: One Rouse Check per type of animal
Animalism.notes: The cost is free if used on their Famulus.

Animalism.name: Leash the Beast
Animalism.effect: Channel their Blood to prevent the Beast from awakening.
Animalism.notes: This can also be used to turn one die's failure into a success with Frenzy tests.

Animalism.name: Messenger's Command
Animalism.effect: Use Compel or Mesmerize through a Famulus.
Animalism.prereq: Animal Messenger and Compel or Mesmerize
Animalism.notes: Dominate rating cannot exceed the Animalism rating.

Animalism.name: Animal Succulence
Animalism.effect: Slake additional hunger from animals and counts Blood Potency as 2 levels lower in regards to slaking penalties.
Animalism.notes: This will never let the character slake to 0.

Animalism.name: Plague of Beasts
Animalism.effect: Mark an individual as a target of animal attention.
Animalism.notes: The target takes the margin of the win as a penalty against Skill pools except Physical, this also makes them easier to track down.

Animalism.name: Quell the Beast
Animalism.effect: Force a vampire's beast to slumber or make a mortal lethargic.
Animalism.notes: Against Vampires this lasts several turns equal to test margin +1.

Animalism.name: Scent of Prey
Animalism.effect: Track a mortal down who has witnessed a masquerade breach.
Animalism.notes: It lasts one night if Critical Win.

Animalism.name: Unliving Hive
Animalism.effect: Extends Animalism influence to swarms of insects.
Animalism.notes: Swarms are treated as single creatures.

Animalism.name: Augury
Animalism.effect: Force a swarm to form an answer to a question.
Animalism.notes: Animalism tests increase in Difficulty by 1 for rest of the session.

Animalism.name: Awaken the Parasite
Animalism.effect: Awaken bugs within the body of a victim.
Animalism.opposing:
Composure +
Resolve or
Stamina +
Wits (If mortal)
Animalism.notes: Vampires can use this power on themselves to instill fear or disgust, they suffer a two-dice penalty for the duration of this scene.

Animalism.name: Subsume the Spirit
Animalism.effect: Possess the body of an animal.
Animalism.notes: The cost is free if used on their Famulus.

Animalism.name: Sway the Flock
Animalism.effect: Influence animals within an area to behave a certain way.
Animalism.notes: The amount of successes determine how influenced the animals are, the Discipline’s range can be increased per Rouse Check.

Animalism.name: Animal Dominion
Animalism.effect: Command flocks or packs of animals.
Animalism.duration: One scene or when the directive is fulfilled
Animalism.notes: This power does not summon animals, instead utilizing those already present.

Animalism.name: Coax the Bestial Temper
Animalism.effect: Either increase or decrease the Difficulty to resist Frenzy for vampires nearby.
Animalism.duration: As long as the user keeps humming
Animalism.notes: Each success of margin increases or decreases the difficulty

Animalism.name: Drawing Out the Beast
Animalism.effect: Transfer their terror or fury frenzy to a nearby victim.
Animalism.notes: This power cannot transfer Hunger Frenzy.

Animalism.name: Spirit Walk
Animalism.effect: Extends Subsume the Spirit to transfer the vampire's consciousness from one animal to another without retreating to their own body.
Animalism.notes: The duration is as though a critical success was rolled.

AUSPEX.name: Heightened Senses
AUSPEX.effect: Enhance vampiric senses and add Auspex rating to all perception rolls.
AUSPEX.notes: Having the power activated for long periods might require the use of Willpower.

AUSPEX.name: Sense the Unseen
AUSPEX.notes: If the target is using Obfuscate they oppose using Wits + Obfuscate vs the user's Wits + Auspex, normal searches use Resolve.

AUSPEX.name: Panacea Errata
AUSPEX.notes: If the user uses this on more than one subject on the same night, the cost increases to spend Willpower equal to half the number of successes in the margin per additional target.

AUSPEX.name: Premonition
AUSPEX.notes: The Storyteller may activate this power passively with no cost, when used actively the user must make a Rouse Check and roll Resolve + Auspex.

AUSPEX.name: Reveal Temperament
AUSPEX.effect: Smell the Resonance of a target and/or if Dyscrasia is present.
AUSPEX.notes: When used on Kindred this reveals information about their last feed.

AUSPEX.name: Unerring Pursuit
AUSPEX.duration: One night plus one for each success
AUSPEX.notes: The victim can roll Wits + Awareness to catch a glimpse of the user once under its effects.

AUSPEX.name: Vermin VisionErrata
AUSPEX.notes: This power works through groups of animals.

AUSPEX.name: Fatal Flaw
AUSPEX.effect: Find the weakness of a target
AUSPEX.notes: It can be defended against with Composure for mental weaknesses or with Stamina for physical.

AUSPEX.name: Scry the Soul
AUSPEX.notes: This can either be used on a single target or a crowd.

AUSPEX.name: Share the Senses
AUSPEX.notes: Sense the Unseen can allow the user to be noticed by the victim.

AUSPEX.name: Haruspex
AUSPEX.effect: Use the recent dead to reroll dice before night's end.
AUSPEX.notes: Requires a mortal body who died within the scene.

AUSPEX.name: Spirit's Touch
AUSPEX.effect: Gathering emotional residue from an object or location
AUSPEX.notes: What information they gleam works from the most recent backward.

AUSPEX.name: Heart Laid Bare
AUSPEX.effect: Know target's deepest fear or desire

AUSPEX.name: Clairvoyance
AUSPEX.duration: Few minutes up to one night
AUSPEX.notes: This power can be used to monitor events in progress.

AUSPEX.name: Possession
AUSPEX.notes: This power does not give the ability to read the target's mind, use their skills or impersonate them.

AUSPEX.name: Telepathy
AUSPEX.cost: One Rouse (one Willpower on non-consenting vampires)
AUSPEX.duration: One minute per rouse or full scene on consenting subject
AUSPEX.notes: The user doesn't need to roll to project their thoughts onto others.

AUSPEX.name: Unburdening the Bestial Soul
AUSPEX.effect: Stain removal or protection from Stains
AUSPEX.notes: This power only works on vampires with a lower Humanity rating.

Blood Sorcery.name: Corrosive Vitae
Blood Sorcery.notes: Does not work against unliving flesh, such as other vampires.

Blood Sorcery.name: Shape the Sanguine Sacrament
Blood Sorcery.effect: Shape blood into a shape or image. Errata
Blood Sorcery.notes: If the user uses their vitae, it costs one Rouse Check.

Blood Sorcery.name: A Taste for Blood
Blood Sorcery.effect: Discover traits of another through their blood.

Blood Sorcery.name: Koldunic Sorcery
Blood Sorcery.effect: Attune with and sense through an element, e.g. Water
Blood Sorcery.cost: One Rouse Check and Aggravated Health Damage
Blood Sorcery.notes: Can be taken multiple times to attune to other elements

Blood Sorcery.name: Blood's Curse
Blood Sorcery.effect: Temporary increase another vampire's Bane Severity.
Blood Sorcery.notes: If the target is a ghoul, thinblood, or Caitiff they get a clan bane.

Blood Sorcery.name: Extinguish Vitae
Blood Sorcery.effect: In use, this increases another Kindred’s Hunger.
Blood Sorcery.notes: The victim can determine who used this power against them if they can see them and win an Intelligence + Occult vs Wits + Subterfuge roll.

Blood Sorcery.name: Scour Secrets
Blood Sorcery.effect: Pore through a large amount of content within minutes. Errata
Blood Sorcery.duration: One night or till the information is found or there’s a dead-end
Blood Sorcery.notes: This power does not allow the user to parse things written in a language they cannot understand.

Blood Sorcery.name: Blood of Potency
Blood Sorcery.notes: This power can allow a Kindred to bypass the Blood Potency limit set by their generation.

Blood Sorcery.name: Scorpion’s Touch
Blood Sorcery.effect: Change own vitae into paralyzing poison.
Blood Sorcery.notes: A mortal who takes any damage from this will go unconscious.

Blood Sorcery.name: Transitive Bond
Blood Sorcery.effect: Extend the properties of Blood Bonding in vitae.
Blood Sorcery.notes: This power was developed originally by the Tremere to combat their bane to only resurface within the Sabbat.

Blood Sorcery.name: Ripples of the Heart
Blood Sorcery.effect: Manipulate the blood or Blood of others.
Blood Sorcery.notes: This power can inflict Compulsions on others who feed from the infected or alter the Resonance of a mortal.

Blood Sorcery.name: Theft of Vitae
Blood Sorcery.effect: Manipulate blood from a victim through the air to feed.
Blood Sorcery.notes: When in use the victim is under the same influence as a standard Kiss.

Blood Sorcery.name: Blood Aegis
Blood Sorcery.duration: One scene or until damage is spent
Blood Sorcery.notes: For each Rouse Check, the user can reduce the damage taken by five points.

Blood Sorcery.name: Fulminating Vitae
Blood Sorcery.effect: Bomb made from jar of vitae.
Blood Sorcery.notes: Deals Aggravated to Kindred, Superficial to Mortals

Blood Sorcery.name: Marionette
Blood Sorcery.effect: Control the blood within a body, either living or dead
Blood Sorcery.duration: One turn per point of margin

Blood Sorcery.name: Baal’s Caress
Blood Sorcery.effect: Change the user's own Vitae into an aggressive and lethal poison.
Blood Sorcery.notes: If a mortal takes one point of damage they die instantly.

Blood Sorcery.name: Cauldron of Blood
Blood Sorcery.effect: Boil the victim's blood in their body.
Blood Sorcery.notes: If a mortal takes one point of damage they die screaming.

Blood Sorcery.name: Reclamation of Vitae
Blood Sorcery.effect: Reclaim the Blood given to create ghouls over distance.
Blood Sorcery.notes: Those outside of the Sabbat take stains upon use.

Celerity.name: Cat’s Grace
Celerity.notes: Does not work on objects that cannot support their weight.

Celerity.name: Fluent Swiftness
Celerity.effect: Reroll Blood Surge on a Dexterity or Celerity test.

Celerity.name: Rapid Reflexes
Celerity.notes: This power also prevents them from taking a penalty when they have no cover during a firefight.

Celerity.name: Fleetness
Celerity.effect: Add Celerity rating for non-combat Dexterity test or defending.
Celerity.notes: This may be used once per turn when defending with associated pools.

Celerity.name: Rush Job
Celerity.effect: Perform a Skill-related task that would take a long time in mere seconds.
Celerity.notes: This power does not speed up attacks or defenses.

Celerity.name: Blink
Celerity.effect: Closes the distance as if teleporting.
Celerity.notes: The user moves in a straight line and may need to make checks against difficult terrain.

Celerity.name: Traversal
Celerity.effect: Move fast enough to move up vertical surfaces or liquid surfaces.
Celerity.notes: The Storyteller should inform the user beforehand if the target is too far away

Celerity.name: Weaving
Celerity.effect: Remove the penalty from dodging multiple ranged opponents.
Celerity.notes: The user can all add their Celerity rating to ranged dodging attempts.

Celerity.name: A Thousand Cuts
Celerity.effect: Add Celerity to Brawl/Melee to automatically impair Mortals and make Kindred a Masquerade Violation
Celerity.notes: Only usable with Claws or Edged Weaponry.

Celerity.name: Blurred Momentum
Celerity.effect: Attacks against the user with fewer successes than their Celerity rating miss.
Celerity.duration: Until the user lets it lapse
Celerity.notes: This works against powers that do not allow defense tests.

Celerity.name: Draught of Elegance
Celerity.effect: Turn their vitae into a Celerity boost for others
Celerity.duration: One Night; for drinkers until the vampire's next feeding or Hunger 5
Celerity.notes: Each drinker must take one Rouse Checks worth.

Celerity.name: Unerring Aim
Celerity.effect: The world slows down to a crawl
Celerity.notes: Those with Celerity 5 may nullify this power with a Rouse Check and defend.

Celerity.name: Unseen Strike
Celerity.effect: Disappear then reappear to surprise attack an enemy.
Celerity.notes: If the test is won, the attack is treated as a surprise attack. Else it follows the same attack/movement rules as Blink.

Celerity.name: Faster than Light
Celerity.effect: While using Blink, make an additional Rouse Check to pass through areas of sunlight or fire without damage or their effect.
Celerity.notes: This does not negate other impacts from daylight or fire, such as Frenzy Checks, awakening rolls, or dice pools.

Celerity.name: Lightning Strike
Celerity.notes: Those with Celerity 5 may nullify this power with a Rouse Check and defend.

Celerity.name: Split Second
Celerity.effect: Alter the events given by Storyteller in a current scene within reason
Celerity.duration: One action, as determined by ST
Celerity.notes: The action should be reasonable and accomplished within a few seconds in real-time.

Fortitude.name: Fluent Endurance
Fortitude.effect: Reroll the Blood Surge rouse check on a Stamina or Fortitude test.

Fortitude.name: Resilience
Fortitude.effect: Add their Fortitude rating to the health track.

Fortitude.name: Unswayable Mind
Fortitude.effect: Add Fortitude rating to rolls to resist methods to sway the character's mind against their will including supernatural.

Fortitude.name: Earth’s Perseverance
Fortitude.effect: Become impossible to move from that spot
Fortitude.duration: One scene or until let go by user
Fortitude.notes: While they cannot be moved, they can still be harmed and so can the floor beneath them.

Fortitude.name: Enduring Beasts
Fortitude.effect: Share the vampire's toughness with animals.
Fortitude.notes: If used on their Famulus, it is free and automatic without a roll required.

Fortitude.name: Invigorating Vitae
Fortitude.effect: Heal mortals faster with the Blood.
Fortitude.cost: None other than the Rouse Checks to give Blood
Fortitude.notes: The risk of ghouling or blood bonding remains present.

Fortitude.name: Obdurate
Fortitude.effect: Maintain footing when hit with a massive force.
Fortitude.notes: Any superficial damage from falling or being hit is reduced by the Fortitude score, before being halved.

Fortitude.name: Toughness
Fortitude.effect: Subtract the Fortitude rating from all superficial damage taken before halving, it cannot be rounded down below one.
Fortitude.notes: This occurs before halving the damage but cannot reduce it below one.

Fortitude.name: Self-Assurance
Fortitude.effect: Take superficial Willpower damage reduced by their level of Fortitude when in Social Combat.
Fortitude.duration: One scene, or until depleted, or until end of social combat
Fortitude.notes: If the damage is Aggravated Willpower damage, they can use the remaining benefit of the power to negate that damage, but it cannot be renewed in the same scene after this.

Fortitude.name: Defy Bane
Fortitude.effect: Convert Aggravated Damage to Superficial Damage.
Fortitude.notes: They may not heal the superficial damage for the rest of the scene.

Fortitude.name: Fortify the Inner Façade
Fortitude.effect: Increasing the Difficulty of mental powers to read or pierce the mind by half of the Fortitude Rating.
Fortitude.notes: If the rules allow them to resist, they add their Fortitude rating to their pool instead.

Fortitude.name: Seal the Beast's Maw
Fortitude.effect: A vampire can ignore the effects of hunger, but reduce their dice pools as a result.
Fortitude.notes: If a dice pool reduces to 0, a Fury Frenzy test is made.

Fortitude.name: Valeren
Fortitude.effect: Mend an injured vampire.
Fortitude.notes: A subject can be affected by the power only once a night.

Fortitude.name: Calloused Soul
Fortitude.effect: Pre-emptively gain stains to prevent/reduce further stain gains.
Fortitude.notes: A vampire actually gains three stains doing this, but one can be mitigated by a Conviction.

Fortitude.name: Draught of Endurance
Fortitude.effect: Turn their vitae into a Fortitude boost for others.
Fortitude.notes: Each drinker must take one Rouse Checks worth.

Fortitude.name: Gorgon’s Scales
Fortitude.effect: Resonances give the Kindred different bonuses.
Fortitude.duration: One scene or until the Resonance is lost
Fortitude.notes: Choleric frees vampires from being staked, Melancholy reduces fire damage, Phlegmatic strengthens against Auspex and, Sanguine reduces damage from sunlight.

Fortitude.name: Shatter
Fortitude.effect: The opponent takes the damage which Toughness subtracts.
Fortitude.notes: Weapons will break if their modifier is met in damage received.

Fortitude.name: Flesh of Marble
Fortitude.effect: Ignore the first source of physical damage each turn unless sunlight.
Fortitude.notes: A critical win on an attack bypasses this power.

Fortitude.name: Prowess from Pain
Fortitude.effect: No longer suffers penalty from Health damage and can increase one Attribute per level of damage on their tracker.
Fortitude.notes: The Attributes may not exceed their Blood Surge value + 6.

Fortitude.name: Meat Shields
Fortitude.effect: Increase Fortitude by a number equal to half the weak mortals present. (Rounded down)
Fortitude.duration: One scene, or when the caster leaves targets

Obfuscate.name: Cloak of Shadows
Obfuscate.effect: As long as the user stands still they blend into their surroundings.
Obfuscate.notes: Follows the general rules for Obfuscate.

Obfuscate.name: Ensconce
Obfuscate.effect: Make others ignore small objects that are held on the vampire's body.
Obfuscate.notes: Sense Unseen can pierce this power.

Obfuscate.name: Silence of Death
Obfuscate.effect: Nullifies the sounds a user makes.
Obfuscate.notes: This power does not eliminate powers made outside of the user's personal space.

Obfuscate.name: Mask of Ages
Obfuscate.effect: Appear as an older or younger version of themselves.
Obfuscate.duration: Until sunrise or ended by user
Obfuscate.notes: Storytellers may limit the amount of bonus dice dependent on the number of decades between their projected and real age.

Obfuscate.name: Cache
Obfuscate.effect: Hide objects that are not held by the vampire.
Obfuscate.notes: This can be extended for the duration of the night with an extra rouse check.

Obfuscate.name: Chimerstry
Obfuscate.effect: Create brief but realistic hallucinations.
Obfuscate.notes: This can be used in combat but can only affect targets once per conflict. Errata

Obfuscate.name: Ghost's Passing
Obfuscate.effect: The user can bestow Obfuscate onto an animal's tracks.
Obfuscate.notes: Sense the Unseen can discern signs as per general Obfuscate rules

Obfuscate.name: Unseen Passage
Obfuscate.effect: The user can now move while remaining hidden.
Obfuscate.notes: This power will fail if the user is being actively watched when activated.

Obfuscate.name: Ventriloquism
Obfuscate.effect: Throw their voice so only the intended recipient can hear it.
Obfuscate.notes: Can be used on anyone in line of sight.

Obfuscate.name: Doubletalk
Obfuscate.effect: Say one thing but convey something else in secret.
Obfuscate.notes: Others present can contest.

Obfuscate.name: Fata Morgana
Obfuscate.effect: Elaborate hallucinations.
Obfuscate.duration: One scene, unless let to lapse
Obfuscate.notes: If the hallucination can trigger Frenzy, give the test at 1 diff lower than the real thing. Errata

Obfuscate.name: Ghost in the Machine
Obfuscate.effect: Allows the effects of Obfuscate to be transmitted through technology when viewed on a live screen.
Obfuscate.notes: If viewed later the image seems blurred, making identification harder.

Obfuscate.name: Mask of a Thousand Faces
Obfuscate.effect: Make themselves appear as a mundane face rather than disappear allowing interaction and communication.
Obfuscate.notes: This power allows them to interact and speak to others around them.

Obfuscate.name: Mask of Isolation
Obfuscate.effect: Force Mask of a Thousand Faces onto a victim.
Obfuscate.duration: One night plus one additional night per margin of success
Obfuscate.notes: Should the user be made aware of the power being used on them the effects end.

Obfuscate.name: Mental Maze
Obfuscate.effect: Remove all sense of direction and location from a victim in a location.
Obfuscate.notes: Eye contact is required to active the power. Errata

Obfuscate.name: Mind Masque
Obfuscate.effect: Hide and replace emotions and thoughts against those who wish to read them through supernatural means.
Obfuscate.notes: The difficulty to mask their emotion depends on how complicated they want the ruse to be.

Obfuscate.name: Guise of the Departed
Obfuscate.effect: Copy appearance and mannerism of a recently dead mortal.
Obfuscate.notes: Sense the Unseen (Auspex 1) can pierce the mask

Obfuscate.name: Conceal
Obfuscate.effect: Cloak an inanimate object.
Obfuscate.duration: One night plus one additional night per margin of success
Obfuscate.notes: This power cannot affect anything larger than a two-story house or anything moving on it's own.

Obfuscate.name: Vanish
Obfuscate.effect: Activate Cloak of Shadows or Unseen Passage while being observed.
Obfuscate.notes: This power makes the memory of mortals foggy and indistinct, but it will not affect the memories of vampires.

Obfuscate.name: Seclusion
Obfuscate.effect: Target is unable to see or hear from any other being, living or unliving.
Obfuscate.duration: Margin number of scenes or nights, or until broken
Obfuscate.notes: Physical harm done unto target causes an additional Discipline test for target to resist effect.

Obfuscate.name: Cloak the Gathering
Obfuscate.effect: Shelter companions under Obfuscate.
Obfuscate.cost: One Rouse Check in additional to the cost of the power extended
Obfuscate.notes: This power extends to a number of people equal to the user's Wits, plus additional Rouse Checks.

Obfuscate.name: Impostor's Guise
Obfuscate.effect: Appear as someone else.
Obfuscate.notes: The face they wish to copy must be studied for at least five minutes from multiple angles.

Oblivion.name: Ashes to Ashes
Oblivion.effect: Destroy a corpse by dissolving it.
Oblivion.notes: If the body is not animated it will dissolve throughout three turns with no test needed.

Oblivion.name: Binding Fetter
Oblivion.effect: Allow users to be able to identify a fetter by use of their senses.
Oblivion.notes: During its use the user receives a -2 penalty to all Awareness, Wits, and Resolve rolls.

Oblivion.name: Oblivion Sight
Oblivion.effect: See in darkness clearly and see ghosts present.
Oblivion.notes: While in use there is a two-dice penalty to social interactions with mortals.Errata

Oblivion.name: Shadow Cloak
Oblivion.effect: =+2 bonus to stealth rolls and intimidation against mortals.

Oblivion.name: Arms of Ahriman
Oblivion.effect: Conjures shadow appendages that the user can control but the user is unable to do anything else.
Oblivion.duration: One scene or until ended or destroyed
Oblivion.notes: Arms do not have a health tracker and do not require Composure + Resolve to escape. Errata

Oblivion.name: Fatal Prediction
Oblivion.effect: Increase the chances of a mortal being harmed by exterior forces.
Oblivion.notes: For every success over margin the victim takes 1 Aggravated damage throughout the duration. The vampire cannot interact with the victim directly or indirectly.

Oblivion.name: Fatal Precognition
Oblivion.effect: Vision of a non-vampires death.
Oblivion.duration: Until fulfilled, avoided or the story ends
Oblivion.notes: The vampire must be able to see or hear the target during the power's use.

Oblivion.name: Shadow Cast
Oblivion.effect: Conjure shadows from the user's body.
Oblivion.notes: The shadow can be extended up to twice the user's Oblivion rating in yards/meters. Those standing in the shadow take more Willpower damage from social conflict

Oblivion.name: Where the Veil ThinsErrata
Oblivion.effect: Determine the density of the Shroud in their area.
Oblivion.notes: The book lists a chart stating the possible different densities and causes, as well as their effects.

Oblivion.name: Aura of Decay
Oblivion.effect: Harnessing their connection to Oblivion can make plants wilt, animals and humans sick, and food spoil.
Oblivion.notes: All social rolls the vampire makes when this power is active takes a two dice penalty. Any contaminated food eaten gives two Superficial Damage.Errata

Oblivion.name: Passion Feast
Oblivion.effect: Allows a vampire to slake Hunger on the passion of wraiths.
Oblivion.notes: The hunger consumed does not return the following night. Errata

Oblivion.name: Shadow Perspective
Oblivion.effect: Projects their senses into a shadow within line of sight.
Oblivion.notes: The use of this power is undetectable in the shadow other than by supernatural means such as Sense the Unseen.

Oblivion.name: Shadow Servant
Oblivion.effect: Use a shadow to spy on or scare others.
Oblivion.notes: The servant has no mind of its own and cannot endure bright lights able to be destroyed by them.

Oblivion.name: Touch of Oblivion
Oblivion.effect: Withers a body part on touch.
Oblivion.notes: Inflicting such damage may warrant Stains up to Storyteller discretion. The user must grip the target. Errata

Oblivion.name: Necrotic Plague
Oblivion.effect: Manifest illness in victims.
Oblivion.duration: One turn to activate, variable length of the condition
Oblivion.notes: This illness cannot be treated in a medical setting as it's supernaturally inflicted, instead only healed by drinking vitae. There is no outcome on Total Failures. Errata

Oblivion.name: Profane the Sanctified
Oblivion.effect: Stun opponents with True Faith and negate its effects, or corrode holy symbols.
Oblivion.prereq: Aura of Decay or Touch of Oblivion
Oblivion.duration: One Turn on opponents, permanent on Holy symbols
Oblivion.notes: Can be used repeatedly without any additional rouse checks, but does not continue to stun after the first turn.

Oblivion.name: Stygian Shroud
Oblivion.effect: Darkness spews out of a nearby shadow and covers the area.
Oblivion.notes: The shadow can be extended up to twice the user's Oblivion rating in yards/meters.

Oblivion.name: Umbrous Clutch
Oblivion.effect: Using the victim's shadow they create a portal, dropping them into the user's arms.
Oblivion.notes: An unprepared mortal will be terrified while a vampire must test for fury or fear Frenzy test at a Difficulty 4.

Oblivion.name: The Darkness Within
Oblivion.effect: Summon a dark entity from a victim whose only goal is to destroy its host
Oblivion.duration: One Scene, or until the entity or its host is destroyed
Oblivion.notes: The Entity has the same skills and disciplines as its host and takes damage like a vampire.

Oblivion.name: Shadow Step
Oblivion.effect: The user can step into one shadow and appear in another within their sight.
Oblivion.notes: A willing person may be taken through the Shadow Step but should the user stain, so does the passenger.

Oblivion.name: Skuld Fulfilled
Oblivion.effect: Reintroduce illnesses someone has recovered from.
Oblivion.duration: Variable, depending on if the condition is treatable
Oblivion.notes: If the victim is a ghoul their immunity to aging is removed and eliminates any vitae in their system.

Oblivion.name: Tenebrous Avatar
Oblivion.effect: Changes their body into a shadow able to move over any surface or through small spaces.
Oblivion.notes: The user takes no damage except sunlight and fire while in this form.

Oblivion.name: Withering Spirit
Oblivion.effect: Erode a victim's spirit till they are a husk.
Oblivion.notes: If the target is Impaired, they will not return as a wraith.

Potence.name: Fluent Strength
Potence.effect: Reroll Blood Surge rouse checks on Strength or Potence rolls.

Potence.name: Lethal Body
Potence.effect: Unarmed attacks do Aggravated Health damage to mortals when used and ignore one level of armor per Potence rating of user.

Potence.name: Soaring Leap
Potence.effect: Leap higher and further than usual.
Potence.notes: They can move as many meters as three times their Potence rating.

Potence.name: Prowess
Potence.effect: Add Potence rating to their unarmed damage and to feats of Strength, add half their Potence rating (Rounded up) to Melee damage.

Potence.name: Relentless Grasp
Potence.notes: Does not benefit the initial grapple test.

Potence.name: Brutal Feed
Potence.effect: Turn feeding into a violent and messy affair that only lasts seconds to Slake the user's Hunger.
Potence.notes: Against vampires the number of feeding actions is halved (rounded down).

Potence.name: Exuberance
Potence.effect: Treat Potence rating as two levels higher when using Potence powers.
Potence.notes: This can take the relative discipline above the limit of 5. But when a critical or failure is rolled, take Aggravated Damage.

Potence.name: Spark of Rage
Potence.effect: The user can add their Potence rating to rile or incite a person or crowd to violent actions.
Potence.notes: Against vampires, the user will roll Manipulation + Potence vs Intelligence + Composure.

Potence.name: Uncanny Grip
Potence.effect: Strengthens their grip on most surfaces, allowing them to climb or hang unsupported.
Potence.notes: The use of this power leaves obvious traces from the damage caused.

Potence.name: Wrecker
Potence.effect: Double Potence rating when used for feats of strength
Potence.notes: It cannot be used against living targets.

Potence.name: Draught of Might
Potence.effect: Turn their vitae into a Potence boost for others.
Potence.notes: Each drinker must take one Rouse Checks worth.

Potence.name: Crash Down
Potence.effect: Deal damage to a small area when using Soaring Leap.
Potence.notes: If opponents total fail or take 3 or more levels of damage they are knocked down.

Potence.name: Earth Shock
Potence.effect: Create a shockwave to throw opponents prone.
Potence.notes: This can only be used once per scene.

Potence.name: Fist of Caine
Potence.effect: Inflict Aggravated Health damage to mortals and supernatural creatures alike.

Potence.name: Subtle Hammer
Potence.effect: Project the vampire’s power in a specific body part.
Potence.notes: You cannot make another attack in the same move, but body parts that have limited movement receive a four-dice bonus or more.

Presence.name: Awe
Presence.effect: Add Presence rating to any Skill roll involving Persuasion, Performance, or Charisma related rolls as per ST discretion.
Presence.prereq: One scene or until ended by the user
Presence.dice: Once the power wears off the victim reverts to their original opinions.

Presence.name: Daunt
Presence.effect: Add Presence rating to any intimidation rolls.
Presence.prereq: One scene or until ended by the user
Presence.dice: Awe and Daunt cannot be used at the same time.

Presence.name: Eyes of the Serpent
Presence.effect: Immobilize a victim by making eye contact.
Presence.prereq: Until eye contact is broken or the scene ends
Presence.dice: A vampire victim can break this by spending Willpower any turn after the first.

Presence.name: Lingering Kiss
Presence.effect: Usable during feedings, the victim gains a bonus to Social attribute for one night.
Presence.prereq: Number of nights equal to the user's Presence rating
Presence.dice: A withdrawal follows where the victim takes a penalty equal to the original bonus when not actively working towards the next fix. It cannot be used on those under a Blood Bond. Unbondable cannot take this discipline power. Errata

Presence.name: Melpominee
Presence.effect: Use Presence without seeing the target, only having them within earshot.
Presence.notes: This works with Awe, Daunt, Dread Gaze, Entrance, and Majesty.

Presence.name: Clear the Field
Presence.effect: Clear a space in a calm and orderly manner.
Presence.dice: They can exempt a number of people equal to their Composure. Errata

Presence.name: Dread Gaze
Presence.effect: Instill fear into a target to make them flee.
Presence.dice: A critical win against a vampire victim means the victim makes a terror Frenzy at difficulty 3.

Presence.name: Entrancement
Presence.effect: Influence someone into a star-struck or beguiled state of mind where they do their best to keep the user happy. Adding their Presence rating in dice to any social rolls against the victim.
Presence.prereq: One hour plus one per point of margin
Presence.dice: If the request is harmful to the victim or their loved ones, or opposes their tenets the test must be made again or Entrancement fails.

Presence.name: Passion Leech
Presence.effect: Leech the passion from a mortal target, gaining the benefits of Humanity 10 temporarily.
Presence.duration: Until Sunset for the vampire, 3 nights for the victim.
Presence.notes: The benefit can be gained only once per night.

Presence.name: Thrown Voice
Presence.effect: Throw their voice from any point within sight and leave the voice there.
Presence.notes: A roll is only needed if being used in combination with Irresistible Voice, Melpominee or similar powers.

Presence.name: True Love's Face
Presence.effect: The victim will perceive the user as a mortal they have strong emotional ties with, be it hatred or love.
Presence.dice: Can net stains for the victim if the perceived target is their touchstone.

Presence.name: Invigorating Display
Presence.effect: After interacting with a crowd, a vampire can inhale the energy of the crowd to experience a unique Resonance.
Presence.notes: The Resonance is usually intense, but can be also acute on a critical win as determined by the Storyteller.

Presence.name: Inflame Desire
Presence.effect: Boost a victim's current desire, seeking only to satisfy it
Presence.notes: Inflicts the Need Compulsion on the victim

Presence.name: Irresistible Voice
Presence.effect: The user's voice alone is enough to use Dominate on a target.

Presence.name: Magnum Opus
Presence.effect: Infusing Presence into artwork.
Presence.dice: Audiences must roll Composure + Resolve to resist its effects.

Presence.name: Suffuse the Edifice
Presence.effect: Extend Presence onto a building.
Presence.notes: If the vampire is present they become the focus instead of the building.

Presence.name: Summon
Presence.effect: Call someone to them who has had certain Presence powers used on them or tasted the user's vitae.
Presence.dice: The victim will not physically or financially harm themselves to reach the user.

Presence.name: Wingman
Presence.effect: Extend Presence onto another character to use.
Presence.cost: One Rouse Check plus additional powers
Presence.notes: The same Presence power used by both does not double the bonus.

Presence.name: Majesty
Presence.effect: Everyone who looks at the user is dumbstruck unable to act in any way other than self-preservation.
Presence.dice: A win on the contested roll allows one turn plus one per margin of freedom.

Presence.name: Star Magnetism
Presence.effect: Allows the use of presence through live-feed technology, does not work on recorded content.
Presence.dice: If using Entrancement the user must speak the targets name clearly.

Protean.name: Eyes of the Beast
Protean.effect: Allows the user to see in total darkness.
Protean.dice: =+2 bonus dice to intimidation against mortals when active.

Protean.name: Squirm
Protean.effect: Turn flesh and bones rubbery, allowing the user to squeeze and fit through tight spaces
Protean.notes: If a rouse check is spent, the user can fit into even impossibly tight spaces about two inches in diameter.

Protean.name: Weight of the Feather
Protean.effect: The user can make themselves almost weightless.
Protean.dice: Wits + Survival is only used when activated as a reaction.

Protean.name: Feral Weapons
Protean.effect: Elongate the user's nails into claws, gaining a +2 modifier to damage or elongate their fangs and not suffer a called shot penalty.
Protean.dice: Superficial damage inflicted by the user is not halved while active.

Protean.name: Vicissitude
Protean.effect: Sculpt the flesh of bodies allowing changes to their own bodies.
Protean.dice: Each success on the roll allows a single change to be made.

Protean.name: Serpent's Kiss
Protean.effect: When biting someone, inject their own vitae into them.
Protean.notes: This can also be used to transport powers like Scorpion's Touch.

Protean.name: The False Sip
Protean.effect: Prevent any blood or Blood from entering their system.
Protean.notes: They must vomit it back up within the scene or extend to an additional scene by making another Rouse Check.

Protean.name: Earth Meld
Protean.effect: Sink into the earth and become one with the soil.
Protean.prereq: One day or more, or until disturbed
Protean.dice: This power only works on natural surfaces and not artificial such as concrete.

Protean.name: Fleshcrafting
Protean.effect: Extends the mastery over the flesh to be used on others.
Protean.dice: An unwilling subject may resist with the margin of the user's role counting as the number of changes able to be made.

Protean.name: Shapechange
Protean.effect: Change into an animal with a similar body mass.
Protean.dice: Users gain the Physical Attributes and other traits of the animal they've changed into.

Protean.name: Visceral Absorption
Protean.effect: Draw in the remains of blood and body to the vampire to clean a scene.
Protean.dice: Hunger can be reduced by one per body, up to the level of their Blood Sorcery rating but cannot reduce to 0.

Protean.name: Masque of Death
Protean.effect: Take on the appearance of a corpse, and while unable to move or communicate, they take any damage only if it deals Aggravated damage.
Protean.duration: Until ended by user, or user wakes from Torpor, or until sunrise
Protean.notes: Disciplines can be used at ST discretion.

Protean.name: Horrid Form
Protean.effect: Take on a monstrous shape.
Protean.dice: Grants several changes equal to the user's Protean rating. Any critical scores are counted as messy criticals and Frenzy checks are made with +2 Difficulty.

Protean.name: Metamorphosis
Protean.effect: Extends shape change by granting it an additional form. The size of their new form isn't restricted by the vampire's mass.

Protean.name: Blood Form
Protean.effect: Turn into an amorphous mass of blood.
Protean.duration: One scene, or until the effect is voluntarily ended.
Protean.notes: Can be consumed, creating blood bonds as normal.

Protean.name: The Heart of Darkness
Protean.effect: Allows a vampire to remove their own heart and store it outside of their body.
Protean.prereq: Permanent or until the heart is destroyed or returned to the host's body
Protean.dice: If the heart is dealt aggravated damage equal to or greater than the user's health tracker, they fall into torpor. It can only be destroyed through fire or sunlight.

Protean.name: Master of Forms
Protean.effect: Allows the vampire to take on any animal shape, rather than just one.
Protean.cost: None, but rouse for Shapechange as normal.
Protean.notes: All other limitations of Shapechange and Metamorphosis apply.

Protean.name: Mist Form
Protean.effect: Turn into a cloud of mist.
Protean.dice: This power takes three turns to use and may be sped up with additional Rouse Checks on a one-for-one trade.

Protean.name: One with the Land
Protean.effect: Sink into the earth of their Domain.
Protean.prereq: One day or more, or until physically disturbed
Protean.dice: Same system as Earth Meld however they are not limited by the material.

Protean.name: Swarm
Protean.effect: Allows the user to shapechange into a swarm of insects, reptiles, or other vermin
Protean.duration: One scene, or until ended voluntarily
Protean.notes: As a swarm, the user can attack a number of individuals equal to their Blood Potency per turn.

Protean.name: The Unfettered Heart
Protean.effect: The heart of the vampire can move freely within the chest, making staking more difficult.
Protean.dice: Only upon a critical win does the stake penetrate when in melee combat.

Protean.name: Face of the Victim
Protean.effect: Assume the shape of someone they last fed from
Protean.duration: Until Hunger 5 or using the power again
Protean.notes: Must be activated in the same scene where they've slaked at least 1 Hunger from either a mortal of Kindred.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Body Paint
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Create tattoos with personal touches beyond regular tattoos
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Permanent, unless erased by skin coloured Body Paint
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: After a week, the roll to alter the tattoo is Stamina + Resolve

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Checkout Time
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Enter a deep torpor where there is no difference between you or a corpse
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: A number of nights written during creation. This cannot exceed 9 nights
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Coming out of this Torpor does not require a Rouse Check. In this state, they have no aura, require no rouse checks and take no damage from sunlight or other banes

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Elevate
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Get high regardless of Humanity or Blush of Life. Temporarily enhances Dexterity if well made
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One Scene
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Badly made Elevate still feels great but degrades Dexterity

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Far Reach
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Push, pull, hold or grab objects or people with their mind.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One turn unless held
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Keeping something held in the air requires a check each turn of Resolve + Alchemy Difficulty 3.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Food Stain
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Mark someone so anyone who drinks from them becomes obvious to the alchemist when they encounter them
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Persists until consumed or applied
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: If the alchemist has Auspex 2, they become aware as soon as the feeding occurs

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Gaoler's Bane
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Receive a 2-dice bonus when freeing themselves from physical restraints or grapples.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One Scene or until ended voluntarily

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Haze
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Create a mist that follows the user, making it harder to shoot them or identify them.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One Scene or until ended voluntarily
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: This can be extended to encompass up to five people with an additional Rouse Check.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Mercurian Tongue
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Speak other languages than their own.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One night or till they feed from someone with the same native language as themselves.
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: The alchemist can spend Willpower and feed from another person to swap the language the alchemist currently knows.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Plug-In
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Produce low-level electrical current from their body.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One scene if lighting one room, till half battery if charging a device.
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: It powers through touch and will stop if the connection is lost.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Portable Shade
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Withstand the effects of Sunlight and walk in the sun.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Hours active are equal to the Stamina + Alchemy test or the next sunset, whichever is first
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: This formula was developed by the Path of the Sun Thin-bloods.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Speak From the Heart
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Place a message into someone's blood. The next vampire to drink from them gets the message
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Messages take 1 minute. Lasts until death or blood is drunk
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Different drinks used in the creation affect the message

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Advanced Torpor
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Immediately cause Torpor
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Until target awakens from Torpor
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Always heal as a vampire, regardless of flaws. Unlike regular torpor, the vampire always has a Rouse Check re-roll

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Blacklight Surprise
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Makes UV light damage vampires
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: At least one hour. Light source breaking ends the effect
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Kindred who already take damage from UV light, take an extra point

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Blood of Mandagloire
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Infect the blood of a herd to cause those who feed from it to fall into a dreamless sleep.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Remains active in the herd's blood for three nights
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Thin-bloods develop this formula within the Second Inquisition.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Blue State
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Forces a target to contemplate obsessively over an ally's failure
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: The Stain remains until the people involved, at least, have an uncomfortable talk
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Kindred gain stains if an ally violates their convictions. Mortals just hold a grudge

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Envelop
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Create a mist that clings to a victim.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One scene or until ended voluntarily
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: This can only be employed on single targets one at a time.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Friends List
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: See connections between Kindred and mortals
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One scene
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Stronger connections require fewer and fewer successes.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Mirror of Trust
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Gain 3 extra dice to persuade or intimidate someone into being honest.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One Hour
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Thin-bloods develop this formula within the Second Inquisition.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Red's Flaming Hot Sauce
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Create a supernatural molotov cocktail
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Until used, the fire lasts one scene or longer based on the surroundings
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Fire spreading from it can be extinguished, but the supernatural source cannot.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Whiff-Its
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Smell and track the Kindred with the highest Blood Potency
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Until Dawn
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: If multiple Kindred have the same BP, a test allows the user to distinguish between them

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Counterfeit Discipline
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Counterfeit a one-dot Discipline
Thin-blood Alchemy.cost: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.dice: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.opposing: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: The same as the power channeled

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Bleed Out
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Liquefy a victim's internal organs into blood enough to feed an entire coterie of Thin-bloods
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Only thin-bloods can feed from the liquefied corpse. Drinkers gain at least 1 Stain.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Chemically-Induced Flashback
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Imbue and experience a Memorium of another vampire.
Thin-blood Alchemy.cost: One Rouse Check in addition to the use of Ashe
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Must use the Fixatio method. The Thin-bloods develop this formula within the Ashfinders. Concoct Ashe is a pre-requisite.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Concoct Ashe
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Create Ashe from the remains of a vampire.
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Must use the Fixatio method. The Thin-bloods develop this formula within the Ashfinders.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Diamond Skin
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Reduces physical damage to the alchemist, turning Aggravated to Superficial
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Until margin of Distillation roll is used up
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Does not affect fire, acid, sunlight or sorcery

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Defractionate
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Turn preserved blood into something palatable by any kindred.
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Each Distillation style has a unique method of tapping for this elixir.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Fang-Stinger
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Introduce blood into a mortal that causes no harm to them but harms vampire's that feed from them.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One day
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Thin-bloods develop this formula within the Second Inquisition.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Fireskin
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Superheat your body
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One Scene
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: They gain +1 additional fire damage with strikes with their body. They are immune to fire but cold hurts more

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Freezer Fluid
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Freeze a vampire's body.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One scene
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Thin-bloods develop this formula within the Second Inquisition.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Hospital Chains
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Prevent someone from healing
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: 2 days per point of margin
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Critical wins last 2 days per success

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Mandagloire
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Emit a gas that causes rigid paralysis in mortals and supernatural creatures.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Three turns
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: For Fixatio alchemists this can be slipped into a drink or burned.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Martian Purity
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Expel blood-borne illnesses through ignited gases
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Two rounds
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Deals 2 Aggravated Health damage

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Mask Off
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Creates an explosion of gas that causes no damage but negates the Blush of Life
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One scene
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Those affected cannot use Blush of Life for rest of the night. The opposing pool is rolled against the Distillation pool

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: On-Demand Sunburn
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Become a sun battery and harm vampires they touch.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Until unleashed or next sunset, whichever is first
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: This formula was developed by the Path of the Sun Thin-bloods.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Profane Hieros Gamos
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Change their form into their ideal human shape.
Thin-blood Alchemy.cost: One Rouse Check or One point of Aggravated Damage for mortals
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Permanent.
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: This cannot spare the Nosferatu from their bane. Errata

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Rumor
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Make a statement and convince one person to agree.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One scene
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: It lingers till something contradicts the target’s agreement.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Stay the Falling Sand
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Slow time
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One round or more if maintained, expires after one use
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Cannot be used on living creatures or kindred.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Saraimu
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Create a sentient blob of slime that acts as a familiar
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: 1 - 3 weeks
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Can only be created using Fixatio.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Tank
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Strengthen their resistance to damage
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Until they take damage or the scene ends
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: The first damage they take is reduced by five.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: TLC
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Enhances the blood of animals so it slakes the same as mortal blood
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Permanent
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Killing an animal cannot slake Hunger to zero

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Troll the Pious
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Cause negatives effects to the religious
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Changes based on what it is smeared on
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Gives one-dice penalty to most dice pools. Those with True Faith take a two-dice penalty instead and suffer hallucinations

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Counterfeit Discipline
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Counterfeit a two-dot Discipline
Thin-blood Alchemy.cost: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.dice: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.opposing: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: The same as the power channeled

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Airborne Momentum
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Achieve flight
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One scene
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Can move at running speed and carrying a human-sized mass slows to walking speed. This can only be used by the alchemist.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Copycat
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Turn into an approximate copy of someone
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Twenty minutes, possibly up to a scene
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Those who know the person whose appearance is borrowed can recognise the difference by rolling the Opposing pool against the Distillation roll

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Discipline Channeling
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Imbue Ashe with Disciplines
Thin-blood Alchemy.cost: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Must use the Fixatio method. The Thin-bloods develop this formula within the Ashfinders. Concoct Ashe is a prerequisite.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Half-Living Conductor
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Be immune to, and redirect electrical currents
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One scene, or voluntarily ended
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Using electricity to attack requires Dexterity + Alchemy. Deals 2 damage, Aggravated to mortals, Superficial to vampires

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Hollow Leg
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Poison another Kindred so that they are unable to slake hunger.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One night or until the victim suffers a hunger Frenzy
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: The victim must be tricked, coerced or forced into drinking this.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Juice Box
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Alters a Formula to be used by any vampire
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: As target Formula
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Requires Methuselah Blood

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Red State
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Erases memories of someone's misdeeds
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Permanent, until target imbibes a choleric Dyscrasia
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Being told of the crime makes no sense to the target

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Short Circuit
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Overload the batteries in electronics or electrical equipment.
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: This allows for alchemists to touch either the object itself or metal connected and short it out.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Toxic Personality
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Secrete caustic bile from their pores and orifices.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One scene
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: The alchemist may touch this without being harmed. It can either be used as a physical attack or by making another Rouse Check, spit as a ranged attack.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Vitae MSG
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Make it hard for vampires to resist feeding off someone.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Once applied to someone, it lasts until dawn, if they survive
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Ventrue feeding off someone appointed with this require 1 less Willpower if they aren't in their preferred category.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Counterfeit Discipline
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Counterfeit a three-dot Discipline
Thin-blood Alchemy.cost: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.dice: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.opposing: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Requires a drop of vitae from a vampire of a matching clan or who possesses the Discipline.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Awaken the Sleeper
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Awaken a vampire from torpor
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Each Distillation style has a unique method of tapping for this elixir.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Beast Mode
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Gain the use of 1 Level 5 Potence, Celerity or Fortitude power
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One Scene
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: The alchemist must succeed on a Willpower test to avoid Frenzy when consuming this

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Da Bomb
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Turn a mortal into a walking time bomb
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One week, or until activated
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Only works when imbibed into mortals.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Flowering Amaranth
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Share diablerie with other thin-bloods.
Thin-blood Alchemy.cost: One Rouse Check made by each participant
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Used for the Diablerie
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Upon a win they gain a Discipline as if a full-blooded though they cannot level it, they do no gain generation and still lose 1 Humanity. They also gain the black-veined aura of Diablerie.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Moment of Clarity
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Harness the power of the Beast to support them.
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: One scene
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Add four dice to Mental Skill pools, Discipline Skill pools, and to Mental resistance checks when Disciplines are used on them. Immune to Messy Criticals and Frenzy.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Saturn's Flux
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Break Blood-bonds
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: Effect kicks in one day after ingestion
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Removing the Blood-bond is painful but Mortals take no damage. Kindred have to take Aggravated damage to expel.

Thin-blood Alchemy.name: Counterfeit Discipline
Thin-blood Alchemy.effect: Counterfeit a four-dot Discipline
Thin-blood Alchemy.cost: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.duration: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.dice: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.opposing: The same as the power channeled
Thin-blood Alchemy.notes: Requires a drop of vitae from a vampire of a matching clan or who possesses the Discipline.
